title: 极简时尚分屏主图
prompt:
Left panel: Show a young man from the back standing inside a {argument name="setting" default="clean, minimal café or takeaway shop interior"}. He is wearing an {argument name="outfit" default="oﬀ-white oversized t-shirt"} with a " {argument name="logo" default="SHAMUS"} "logo printed large across the back,
and a matching light beige cap with the SHAMUS logo on it. The environment should have light wooden
counters and shelves, warm natural lighting, and minimal branded packaging displayed on the shelves
in the background. The mood should feel clean, airy, and contemporary. Right panel: Show a cropped
lifestyle shot of a person standing near a wooden doorway or wall, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt
and loose black pants, holding a white paper takeaway bag with a die-cut handle. The " SHAMUS" logo
Only the lower torso and hand should be visible for a stylish editorial composition

title: 名人影院柜台场景

title: 喜茶饮品冲击视觉
prompt:
喜茶芝芝莓莓 + 亚洲美女 | 粉桃色渐变背景 [镜头] 极端广角低机位仰拍 
人物 镜头从模特下方往上打，前景的手 + 喜茶芝芝莓莓，被极度放大，背景的人物被压缩，瞬间把产品拉成视觉中心，制造 "手要冲出屏幕" 的冲击力。 前后景分层: 前景 (产品 / 手) 100% 清晰锐利，背景 (模特) 做轻微景深虚化，拉开了画面的空间感。 动态姿态配合：模特身体后仰，手臂前伸，配合低机位，既拉长了线条，又强化了 "向前递出产品" 的叙事感，让画面不呆板。 [光影与质感] 统一色调渐变背景：没有多余元素，用柔和粉桃色渐变，既突出了产品，又和人物的服装色调呼应，整体和谐不杂乱。 影棚级柔光 + 硬高光：喜茶芝芝莓莓，同时保留柔和的过渡阴影，既保证了时尚大片的干净质感，又不会让画面发灰。

title: 环保服饰广告海报
prompt: A premium eco-conscious fashion advertisement, shot as a refined editorial product photo. A single off-white or natural cream crew-neck T-shirt hangs on a smooth wooden hanger with a black metal hook, placed against a lush wall of dense green leaves and climbing vines. The hanger has a small minimalist brand monogram engraved near the neck. The shirt is shown from the upper torso down to part of the hem, slightly angled, with soft natural folds and high-quality cotton texture. Printed inside the collar is a minimalist brand mark and the text "JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS". Hanging from the neckline is 1 rectangular recycled-paper seed tag tied with rustic brown twine; the tag reads "Tulsi" and "Plantable Seed Tag" with a tiny sprouting seed detail near the bottom. From the tag, 1 real tulsi plant stem grows upward across the front of the shirt, with several fresh green leaves, visually demonstrating that the tag is plantable. Add a small fine-label annotation near the tag reading "TULSI PLANTABLE SEED TAG". On the right side, large elegant white serif typography says {argument name="headline text" default="Plant it."}. Beneath it, place 3 stacked lines of narrow uppercase sans-serif copy: "WEAR IT.", "PLANT IT.", and "GROW WITH IT.". At the lower left, add the brand name in spaced uppercase serif text: {argument name="brand name" default="JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS"}, with a thin horizontal line above it. At the lower right, add 3 lines of small uppercase sans-serif text: "FSC® CERTIFIED PACKAGING.", "ZERO SYNTHETIC FIBRE", and "BACKED BY ZERODHA.". Use soft diffused daylight, shallow depth of field, moody green-and-cream color grading, luxury sustainable-brand aesthetics, clean composition, vertical poster layout, subtle shadows, and a calm organic atmosphere. Keep the design minimal, premium, and photorealistic, with the shirt occupying the left half and the typography balanced on the right.

title: H&M 潮流促销海报
prompt:
H&M "STYLE FOR EVERY VERSION" Ultra-Premium Fashion SMM Promotional Poster, Vertical 4:5, Instagram Hero Campaign, Global Fashion Advertising, Commercial Fashion Graphic Design, Youth Culture Marketing, Agency-Level Art Direction, Behance Front Page Quality, 8K UHD, Hyper-Realistic, Fashion × Graphic Design Fusion, social-first advertising, energetic commercial design, identity-driven storytelling, H&M sells possibility rather than clothing, one collection expressing multiple personalities, campaign built around individuality, self-expression, confidence, versatility and personal style.

The entire composition feels like multiple social media posts colliding together into one high-impact visual system, dynamic layered collage aesthetic, modern youth-culture advertising, oversized typography integrated into photography, overlapping design elements, disruptive layouts, editorial cutouts, digital-native graphic design language, movement and energy throughout the frame, inspired by Spotify Wrapped, Nike youth campaigns, Pinterest trend reports, magazine covers and modern social media design systems.

Four distinct H&M personalities occupy different zones of the composition. Look 01: Streetwear girl wearing oversized denim jacket, baggy cargo pants, white sneakers, confident stance, urban energy, trend-driven styling. Look 02: Minimalist woman wearing monochrome tailoring, clean silhouette, effortless sophistication, modern confidence, understated styling. Look 03: Creative male wearing layered overshirt, relaxed trousers, street-inspired fashion, artistic energy, contemporary styling. Look 04: Weekend casual look featuring graphic tee, denim, lightweight jacket, relaxed attitude, approachable confidence. All characters represent different versions of the same generation, demonstrating multiple identities within one H&M collection.

Massive oversized condensed typography dominates nearly 70% of the composition. The words STYLE FOR EVERY VERSION occupy the majority of the frame. Typography interacts directly with subjects, some letters overlapping people, some disappearing behind clothing, some extending beyond the frame boundaries, large-scale disruptive layout, energetic visual hierarchy, graphic design functioning as a primary storytelling device rather than decoration.

Bold H&M red dominates the visual environment, large white graphic blocks, layered fashion graphics, subtle paper textures, torn-paper collage effects, editorial cutout treatments, modern digital design language, dynamic depth created through overlapping visual layers, contemporary social media aesthetic.

Top left official H&M logo. Massive central typography: STYLE FOR EVERY VERSION. Campaign headline: YOUR STYLE. YOUR RULES. Supporting copy: The latest collection for every side of you. Promotional CTA block: SHOP NOW → Explore New Arrivals. Feature strip: WOMENSWEAR • MENSWEAR • ACCESSORIES • NEW ARRIVALS. Bottom right: UP TO 40% OFF. Bottom center: www.hcoVertical edge text: H&M SUMMER 2026.

Integrated promotional elements include NEW ARRIVALS, SUMMER DROP 2026, UP TO 40% OFF, ONLINE EXCLUSIVE, LIMITED STOCK, FREE SHIPPING, MEMBERS GET EARLY ACCESS, TRENDING NOW. Editorial labels and social proof elements distributed throughout composition including Trending Now, Most Loved, Editor's Picks, Best Sellers, New This Week, Styled By Thousands. Premium hierarchy, modern retail psychology, commercial fashion marketing intelligence.

Color palette built around H&M red, white, black, denim blue, cream and selective seasonal color accents. High contrast visual system, bold brand recognition, youthful energy, modern commercial fashion aesthetic, immediate social-media impact.

Bright commercial fashion lighting, clean highlights, rich fabric detail, realistic material textures, natural skin rendering, youthful optimistic atmosphere, authentic expressions, candid movement, premium campaign photography.

title: 马斯克直播截图风
prompt:
A 9:16 vertical version, high-detail realistic style Chinese TikTok live screenshot, Elon Musk is talking to the mobile phone camera in the live broadcast room, excited, smiling, and the live atmosphere is warm and real. He held a white handwritten sign in one hand, which clearly said: "Thank you Shinning". There are obvious Chinese TikTok interface elements in the live broadcast screen, including likes, comments and share icons arranged vertically on the right, scrolling Chinese bullet screens and interactive comments below, and the "live broadcast" logo at the top, which looks like a real mobile phone screenshot. There is an eye-catching gift prompt special effect in the screen: "Shinning sent TikTok No. 1", with gift animation light effect and platform-style prompt box. Musk is in a professional live broadcast environment, with a mobile phone holder, a ring fill light and a desktop microphone in front of him. The background is a modern technology live broadcast room with bright lights and a slight neon atmosphere. The composition is real and natural, like the ongoing live screenshot of the Chinese short video platform. The interface information is rich but not messy, the characters are clear, the expression is vivid, the details are rich, the sense of real photography, the depth of field, high definition, cinematic, photorealistic, realistic livestream screenshot, social media UI, Chinese Douyin live room, detailed lighting, natural skin texture.
Negative prompts:
Low definition, blur, cartoon, illustration, too strong CG sense, two-dimensional, deformed fingers, wrong text, scrambled code, multiple mobile phones, multiple brands, character repetition, face collapse, facial features distortion, excessive skin polishing, overexposure, too dark, messy background, wrong UI, non-Chinese short video interface, too many English bullet screens, gift special effects are not obvious, cropping error, proportional error
Supplementary reinforcement words:
Real mobile phone screen recording screenshot feeling, the live broadcast UI is complete, the gift prompt box conforms to the style of the Chinese short video platform, the Chinese comment area is active, the number of people online in the live broadcast room is clearly displayed, and the time, power and signal bar are visible.

title: 电影摄影师棚拍
prompt:
A focused cinematographer operates a professional cinema camera on a tripod, his intense gaze framed by the matte black housing of the lens. The scene is set within a dimly lit production studio, utilizing cinematic Rembrandt lighting that carves out the contours of his face while casting deep, dramatic shadows. Volumetric haze permeates the background, catching a sharp diagonal beam of light that emphasizes the technical environment. The composition utilizes a shallow depth of field, rendering the foreground camera rig in crisp detail while the studio equipment in the background dissolves into soft, indistinct bokeh. The cool, desaturated color palette enhances the professional industrial aesthetic, with subtle specular highlights reflecting off the metallic surfaces of the gear and the subject's skin.

* **Style:** Hyper-photorealistic cinematic CGI
* **Key elements:** Cinematographer, cinema camera, studio tripod, volumetric light beam, production equipment
* **Lighting:** High-contrast Rembrandt lighting, cool color temperature, sharp diagonal key light
* **Camera:** Close-up shot, 50mm lens, eye-level angle, shallow depth of field

title: 橙色时尚美妆大片
prompt:
Ultra-realistic high-fashion beauty portrait of a young East Asian woman, centered composition, looking directly into the camera with a confident and elegant expression. Soft flawless porcelain skin, large warm brown eyes, natural makeup with subtle eyeliner, soft peach blush, glossy nude-orange lips. Dark brown hair styled in a loose messy updo with wispy face-framing strands.

Wearing narrow futuristic black cat-eye sunglasses with vivid orange tinted lenses positioned low on the nose, bold glossy orange hoop earrings, and a bright neon-orange sleeveless textured knit top. Matching orange manicure with one finger gently touching the lower lip in a stylish editorial pose.

Clean light gray studio background, minimalistic fashion photography, luxury magazine cover aesthetic, professional beauty lighting, soft diffused light, sharp focus on eyes and skin texture, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed facial features, premium skincare glow, natural skin pores, cinematic color grading, high-end Vogue-inspired fashion campaign, 85mm lens, f/2.0, HDR, photorealistic, 8K resolution.

Negative Prompt:
blurry, low resolution, extra fingers, deformed hands, asymmetrical eyes, bad anatomy, overexposed highlights, harsh shadows, cartoon, illustration, CGI, watermark, text, logo, duplicate accessories, messy background, noise, grain, distorted sunglasses, unrealistic skin, oversaturated colors.
